title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including excessive token consumption without proportional shipping of products, valuations shifting from OpenAI to Anthropic, and emerging use cases like AI-powered trading at Robinhood. They examine whether the current AI investment surge is sustainable or driven by circular financing and unrestrained spending.
